title: Proxy Task Monitoring & Skill Updates

actors.name: ProxyAgent
actors.description: The loop orchestrator / proxy process that drives task claiming and evolution cycles

actors.name: Hub
actors.description: Remote message hub that delivers inbound tasks and skill_update messages

actors.name: Administrator
actors.description: Configures skill path and capability filters; enables/disables the loop bridge

actors.name: Store
actors.description: Persistent state layer – getState/setState, send, poll, ack, countPending

actors.name: Filesystem
actors.description: Local FS used by SkillUpdater (skill.md write/backup) and rejectPendingRun (atomic JSON write)

use_cases.name: Subscribe to Task Queue
use_cases.description: Persists subscription state and sends task_subscribe message with capability_filter to Hub via Store

use_cases.name: Unsubscribe from Task Queue
use_cases.description: Clears subscription state and sends task_unsubscribe message to Hub via Store

use_cases.name: Record Task Claimed
use_cases.description: Increments claimed counter, timestamps, persists metrics to Store

use_cases.name: Record Task Completed
use_cases.description: Increments completed counter, computes rolling avg_completion_ms (last 100 samples), persists to Store

use_cases.name: Record Task Failed
use_cases.description: Increments failed counter, persists metrics snapshot to Store

use_cases.name: View Task Metrics
use_cases.description: Returns subscribed status, received/claimed/completed/failed counts, pending inbound count, timing stats

use_cases.name: Report Heartbeat Metadata
use_cases.description: Returns compact task metrics subset for inclusion in periodic heartbeat messages

use_cases.name: Poll & Apply Skill Updates
use_cases.description: Polls Store for skill_update messages; for each: calls processSkillUpdate, then acks if successful. Returns count applied.

use_cases.name: Process Single Skill Update
use_cases.description: Validates content, backs up existing skill.md, writes new content to skillPath, records last_skill_update and skill_version in Store

use_cases.name: Configure Skill Path
use_cases.description: Sets the filesystem path where skill.md updates will be written

use_cases.name: Check Pending Solidify
use_cases.description: Returns true if last_run.run_id exists and differs from last_solidify.run_id, gate that blocks new evolution cycles

use_cases.name: Reject Pending Run
use_cases.description: Reads evolution_solidify_state.json, writes last_solidify = {run_id, rejected:true, reason:'loop_bridge_disabled_autoreject_no_rollback'} atomically via tmp+rename

relationships: UC8 includes UC9 (pollAndApply iterates and delegates to processSkillUpdate)
UC11 extends UC1/UC3 (isPendingSolidify gates loop before each cycle start)
UC12 extends UC8 (rejectPendingRun fires after evolve.run() when EVOLVE_BRIDGE=false and pending solidify detected)
TaskMonitor depends_on Store (getState, setState, send, countPending)
rejectPendingRun depends_on Filesystem (readJsonSafe → writeFileSync tmp → renameSync)
ProxyAgent uses SkillUpdater (periodic skill update polling)
Hub delivers task messages → Store → TaskMonitor subscription
Hub delivers skill_update messages → Store → SkillUpdater.pollAndApply

key_logic.isPendingSolidify: Compares last_run.run_id vs last_solidify.run_id; true if run is unsolidified — blocks loop from starting new cycle
key_logic.rejectPendingRun: Auto-rejects (state-only, no git rollback) when bridge is disabled; marks rejected=true with reason tag; atomic write via .tmp file
key_logic.TaskMonitor_stats: Rolling 100-sample window for avg_completion_ms; stats persist across restarts via Store (task_monitor_stats key)
key_logic.SkillUpdater_backup: Always creates skill.md.bak before overwriting; stores skill_version and last_skill_update in Store state
